title: ACDP Similarity Request
description: Request body for POST /contexts/similar (RFC-ACDP-0005 §3.2). Constraints from §3.5: finite IEEE 754 numbers only, dimension match against embedding_model, top_k bounds.

embedding.description: Vector for similarity search. MUST contain only finite IEEE 754 doubles (no NaN, +Infinity, -Infinity).

embedding_model.description: Model identifier. MUST be in the registry's supported_embedding_models. Cross-model similarity is undefined.

filters.description: Optional filters; same fields as keyword-search query parameters in RFC-ACDP-0005 §2.1.
